title: Design System: Telegram Audio Bot Admin

title.purpose: Form labels, table headers, metadata labels.

label.purpose: Status badges and table column headers only. Uppercase + tracked.

mono.purpose: API keys, model IDs, pipeline role identifiers, code values.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing — expo-out feel for state transitions.

motion.name: duration-standard
motion.purpose: Panel reveals, status changes, focus rings.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action. Operational Amber fill, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(0.68 0.17 38); color: oklch(0.96 0.004 30); padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: none; border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 120ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.58 0.18 35); transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.68 0.17 38 / 0.3); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(0); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Secondary action. Raised surface, border, ink text.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { background: oklch(0.21 0 0); color: oklch(0.96 0.004 30); padding: 10px 20px; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; border: 1px solid oklch(0.26 0 0); border-radius: 6px; cursor: pointer; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), border-color 150ms; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(0.26 0 0); border-color: oklch(0.34 0 0); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.68 0.17 38 / 0.3); }

components.name: Status Indicator — OK
components.description: Bot running / provider healthy. Teal dot + label.
components.css: .ds-status-ok { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-status-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.68 0.16 155); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-status-label { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.96 0.004 30); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Status Indicator — Warn
components.description: Degraded provider or incomplete configuration. Amber dot.
components.css: .ds-status-warn { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; } .ds-status-dot-warn { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; background: oklch(0.72 0.13 60); flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-status-label-warn { font-size: 0.9375rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.96 0.004 30); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form input. Raised surface, amber focus ring.
components.html: La chiave viene cifrata a riposo.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; } .ds-label { font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.96 0.004 30); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-input { background: oklch(0.21 0 0); color: oklch(0.96 0.004 30); border: 1px solid oklch(0.26 0 0); border-radius: 6px; padding: 10px 12px; font-size: 0.9375rem; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', monospace; transition: border-color 150ms, box-shadow 150ms; outline: none; width: 100%; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.40 0.006 30); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.68 0.17 38); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.68 0.17 38 / 0.25); } .ds-help { font-size: 0.8125rem; color: oklch(0.52 0.006 30); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; }

components.name: Card / Panel
components.description: Standard content container. Panel bg, Rule border.
components.html:
Provider OpenAI

Whisper + GPT-4o configurati.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(0.16 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.26 0 0); border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px; } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 12px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 1.125rem; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.96 0.004 30); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; letter-spacing: -0.01em; line-height: 1.3; } .ds-card-desc { font-size: 0.875rem; color: oklch(0.52 0.006 30); font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; margin-top: 4px; line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Status Badge
components.description: Inline semantic status chip. Uppercase label, semantic tint.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 3px 10px; border-radius: 9999px; font-size: 0.6875rem; font-weight: 600; letter-spacing: 0.05em; text-transform: uppercase; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-badge-ok { background: oklch(0.68 0.16 155 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.75 0.16 155); } .ds-badge-warn { background: oklch(0.72 0.13 60 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.78 0.13 60); } .ds-badge-error { background: oklch(0.60 0.22 25 / 0.15); color: oklch(0.68 0.22 25); }

components.name: Navbar
components.description: Top navigation bar. Dark surface, amber active state.
components.html:
🎵 Audio Bot
DashboardProviderPipeline
components.css: .ds-nav { background: oklch(0.14 0 0); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.22 0 0); } .ds-nav-inner { max-width: 1120px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 16px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; height: 52px; } .ds-nav-brand { font-weight: 700; font-size: 1rem; color: oklch(0.96 0.004 30); text-decoration: none; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-nav-links { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; } .ds-nav-link { color: oklch(0.52 0.006 30); font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 500; text-decoration: none; padding: 6px 12px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: oklch(0.96 0.004 30); background: oklch(0.21 0 0); } .ds-nav-link.ds-active { color: oklch(0.68 0.17 38); }

narrative.overview:
This is an admin interface for operators — people who self-hosted this bot because they wanted control, not convenience. Every screen should feel like a well-designed instrument panel: dense where density serves scanning, minimal where focus matters, and never wasting a pixel on decoration that doesn't carry operational information.

The surface is dark by design — not as a stylistic choice but as a consequence of use. An admin who checks bot health at 11pm on a dark screen needs fast legibility and low eyestrain. Amber-orange as the primary accent is a deliberate break from generic-SaaS blue: it reads as operational (traffic lights, cockpit readouts, terminal prompts), signals importance without aggression, and pairs well with the dark field.

Typography leans on Inter's precision and a monospace accent for technical values (API keys, model IDs, token counts). No serif sentimentality — this is a tool, not a publication.
keyCharacteristics: Dark field with high-contrast ink — operational, not decorative
Amber-orange primary accent: confident, distinctive, no blue-SaaS DNA
Teal/cyan for status OK states — color-coded at a glance
Monospace accents for technical values: IDs, keys, model names
Gently curved corners (6px) — structured but not harsh
Motion only for state transitions: no scroll reveals, no section entrances

rules.name: The One Amber Rule
rules.body: Operational Amber appears only on interactive elements that demand action and on progress/step indicators. It never fills a background panel or decorates a heading. Its scarcity is what makes it legible as a signal.

rules.name: The Semantic Color Rule
rules.body: Teal means healthy. Red means broken. Amber means warn or act. Never use these colors decoratively.

rules.name: The No-Eyebrow Rule
rules.body: Uppercase tracked labels are reserved for status badges and table column headers. Never above a section heading as a decorative kicker.

rules.name: The Tonal-First Rule
rules.body: Before reaching for a drop shadow, ask whether a surface lightness step achieves the same hierarchy. On a dark field, shadows can disappear entirely — tonal steps never do.

dos: Do use Operational Amber exclusively for interactive elements that demand an action or represent the active/focus state.
Do communicate bot health via the semantic color trio — teal (running), red (broken), amber (warn) — consistently across every status surface.
Do use JetBrains Mono for all technical values: API keys, model IDs, pipeline role identifiers.
Do use tonal surface steps (Void → Panel → Raised Surface) to create hierarchy before reaching for shadows.
Do keep uppercase tracked text to status badges and table column headers only.
Do show focus rings on every interactive element — this is an admin tool, keyboard navigation is expected.
donts: Don't use cream, sand, warm-neutral, or any near-white warm-tinted background. The bg is dark.
Don't use the generic SaaS blue (#2563eb or equivalents) as a primary color.
Don't place uppercase tracked labels as decorative eyebrows above section headings.
Don't use drop shadows on cards or panels at rest. Tonal layering only.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text) — never.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on cards or callouts.
Don't build identical card grids where every card is the same size, same structure, same icon-heading-text layout.
Don't add motion to section entrances or page loads.
